findings.description: CLI entry point only — argparse handles all input parsing. No direct SQL, no file write, no LLM calls, no network access. All execution delegates to pipeline/orchestration.py functions.

--mode daily path (line 75-77): calls asyncio.run(run_daily(config, ...)). Config from MarketMindConfig.from_env() — no user-controlled path injection. Shadow count passed as int from argparse with default=None.
sys.path.insert(0, ...) at line 8 — adds parent directory to path for imports. Standard pattern for running as __main__ without package install. Path is derived from __file__, not user input.
94 lines — well under 150-line CLI entry point ceiling. Only argument dispatch and mode routing. No business logic present.

notes: Clean entry point. All modes preserved (daily, interactive, backtest, gui, gate1, full). No security concerns — argparse provides type safety for all CLI arguments. The backtest path delegates to pipeline/backtest_entry.py which is a separately audited module.
